---
title: "Nick Katz"
image: images/_DSC3439.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 45em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nick-katz-97bb04255/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/nickkatz625
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:nickkatz575@gmail.com"
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/katzperformanceandtraining/
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    
---

## RTT Researcher | Pitching Analyst | Ping-pong Enthusiast 

---

## Recent Updates & Projects

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .p-4 .shadow-sm .bg-light}
###  Layback Podcast Episode OUT NOW!
I was honored to hop on the Layback Podcast with FlexProGrip founder Adam Moreau to talk shop on all things impulses and my research.

[**Watch the Deep Dive Here! &rarr;**](https://youtu.be/XVqAdkR39-M?si=SxaqlieEFDToBfvN)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .p-4 .shadow-sm .bg-light}
###  SQL Force Plate Database
The building blocks of creating a facility-wide database in SQL using hawkinR for data extraction. 

[**Read Full Analysis &rarr;**](class-projects.qmd#sql-database)
:::
:::

:::
